summary: Show texting threads for given company
description: Show texting threads for given company. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/texting/threads. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include non_candidates.

params.name: non_candidates
params.description: Pass true to have non candidates threads

example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/texting/threads

Required params: company_id

Optional params: non_candidates
